name: Anjelah Johnson
bio: Anjelah Johnson-Reyes is an American stand-up comedian and actress, and a former Oakland Raiders cheerleader, who went viral with her Nail Salon routine before joining the cast of MADtv. On MADtv she created the rude fast-food employee character Bon Qui Qui, which became a lasting internet phenomenon. She has released multiple stand-up specials, including for Comedy Central and Netflix, built around observational and character comedy.

timeline.ev: Moves to Los Angeles to pursue comedy
Joins the cast of MADtv and debuts Bon Qui Qui
Nominated for an ALMA Award for her MADtv work
Releases Comedy Central special That's How We Do It

accolades: Viral Nail Salon routine drew tens of millions of views
Created the breakout MADtv character Bon Qui Qui

specials.t: Anjelah Johnson: That's How We Do It
